COMMUNITY_POSTS.author: Meena R.
COMMUNITY_POSTS.text: My father's HbA1c just came down to 6.8% from 8.1% in 3 months — Metformin + diet changes. Anyone else seen similar results?

replies.author: Suresh K.
replies.text: Excellent! Low GI foods + regular walks made a similar difference for my wife. Keep it consistent.

replies.author: Ananya P.
replies.text: Metformin + portion control — 7.2% to 6.5% in 4 months for my mother. It works!

replies.author: Rahul V.
replies.text: Is he exercising too? 30-min daily walks combined with meds made a huge difference for us.

COMMUNITY_POSTS.author: Suresh K.
COMMUNITY_POSTS.text: Has anyone shared records with a cardiologist abroad using ArogyaVault? How does group sharing work for international remote consultations?

replies.author: Meena R.
replies.text: Yes! Shared a group with a Singapore cardiologist — read-only access, works perfectly.

replies.author: Ananya P.
replies.text: The AI Summary PDF is especially useful for international consultants needing a quick overview.

COMMUNITY_POSTS.author: Ananya P.
COMMUNITY_POSTS.text: Reminder: the AI Health Summary is incredibly useful for new specialists. My oncologist was impressed with the structured format. Hit 'Export' in ArogyaAI.

replies.author: Suresh K.
replies.text: Seconded! Saved 20 minutes of explanation at my last cardiology appointment.

replies.author: Prabhav R.
replies.text: Does it include imaging reports? My MRI is uploaded but not sure AI reads those.

COMMUNITY_POSTS.author: Divya M.
COMMUNITY_POSTS.text: Iron deficiency tip: if CBC shows low Hb, ask your doctor about liquid iron vs. tablets. Liquid absorbs much faster for moderate anaemia cases.

replies.author: Meena R.
replies.text: My mother switched to liquid iron — Hb went from 9.1 to 11.3 g/dL in 6 weeks.

replies.author: Suresh K.
replies.text: IV iron is even faster for severe deficiency. ArogyaVault's trend tracking is great for this.

replies.author: Ananya P.
replies.text: Liquid iron + Vitamin C together boosts absorption. Always confirm with your doctor.

replies.author: Rahul V.
replies.text: Bookmarked. My sister's Hb is 9.8 — will share this with her doctor.

POST_SUMMARIES.0: Community strongly agrees: Metformin + low-GI diet + daily 30-minute walks produces meaningful HbA1c drops within 3–4 months. Multiple members reported drops from the 7–8% range to 6.5–6.8%. Consistency with both medication and lifestyle is the critical factor.
POST_SUMMARIES.1: International group sharing works seamlessly with read-only access for specialists. The AI Summary PDF is particularly valued — it gives unfamiliar doctors structured context quickly, reducing lengthy verbal explanations at appointments.
POST_SUMMARIES.2: Strong consensus that the AI Health Summary export saves 15–20 minutes per specialist visit. One open community question: whether uploaded MRI/imaging reports are fully parsed and included in the AI-generated summary.
POST_SUMMARIES.3: Liquid iron absorbs significantly faster than tablets for moderate anaemia — one member reported Hb rising from 9.1 to 11.3 g/dL in just 6 weeks. Combining liquid iron with Vitamin C boosts absorption further. IV iron is preferred for severe deficiency.

POST_AI_RESPONSES.0: Metformin + lifestyle changes (low-GI diet + 150 min/week moderate exercise) reduces HbA1c by 1–2% on average per clinical data. A 1.3% drop in 3 months is excellent. Sustaining daily walks alongside medication adherence is the key to long-term results.
POST_AI_RESPONSES.1: ArogyaVault supports read-only group access for international specialists. The AI Summary PDF export is strongly recommended — it condenses medications, diagnoses, and recent lab trends into a single structured document any doctor can quickly review.
POST_AI_RESPONSES.2: The AI Export includes all uploaded documents. Imaging reports (MRIs, X-rays) are processed if uploaded — the AI extracts and summarises key findings. Pure image-only scans without accompanying report text may not be fully analysed.
POST_AI_RESPONSES.3: Liquid ferrous sulfate has ~40% higher bioavailability than tablets due to faster dissolution. Taking it alongside 500mg Vitamin C significantly enhances non-haem iron absorption. Avoid tea, coffee, or dairy within 2 hours of dosing .
